rationale: TASK-087 is ready to close. Full domain-led layering migration acceptance is met: domain modules exist for task/roadmap, session queue/artifact status, build lifecycle, validation profiles, and state sections; application compiler wrappers exist for feedback/documentation/planning/implementation; gateway profile wrappers are separated; state graph remains application-generated representation with domain section taxonomy; dependency guards and regression tests prevent wrong layer imports. Implementation validation passed and content is committed with immutable proof.
